main.description: A record indicating the actor owns a game on a specific platform. May include attestation signatures proving ownership was verified by an external service.

platform.description: The platform where ownership was verified.

signatures.description: Attestation signatures proving ownership was verified. Can be inline signatures or strongRefs to remote proof records.

gameRef.description: Reference to a game, either by AT URI or external platform ID.

uri.description: AT URI of the game record.

externalId.description: External platform's ID for the game.
